hero.title: Find Your Dream Property in North Macedonia
hero.subtitle: Browse thousands of properties for sale and rent across North Macedonia

footer.description: Your trusted real estate platform in North Macedonia. Find your dream house, apartment, or office.

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are North Macedonia's leading real estate platform, providing professional services for property sales and rentals.

chat.title: NovaBuildings Assistant
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm the NovaBuildings assistant. How can I help you today?
chat.defaultResponse: I'm not sure about that. You can browse our properties, visit the contact page, or ask me about buying, renting, pricing, or locations in North Macedonia.
chat.properties: You can browse all available properties on our Properties page. Use filters to narrow down by type, price, location, and more!
chat.buySell: Looking to buy or sell? Browse our listings on the Properties page. To sell your property, contact us through the Contact page and our team will assist you.
chat.rent: We have many rental properties available! Visit the Properties page and filter by 'For Rent' to see all rental listings.
chat.price: Listing your property on NovaBuildings is completely free. Property prices vary by type, location, and size — browse our listings to compare.
chat.contact: You can reach us through our Contact page. Our team is ready to help with any questions about buying, selling, or renting properties.
chat.location: We cover all regions of North Macedonia including Skopje, Tetovo, Gostivar, Kumanovo, Bitola, Ohrid, and Struga.
chat.account: Admin access is available for property management. Contact us if you need account assistance.
chat.favorites: You can save properties to your favorites by clicking the heart icon on any listing. View all your saved properties from the Favorites page.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How can I sell my property?
faq.a1: You can submit your property by clicking the 'Submit Property' button and filling out the form.
faq.q2: Is it free to list a property?
faq.a2: Yes, basic property listing is completely free.
faq.q3: How can I contact an agent?
faq.a3: Each property has a contact form where you can send a message directly to the agent.
faq.a4: Yes, click the heart icon on any property to save it to your favorites list.
